What We Offer

We consult. We plan. We execute.

Whether you're building a refurbishment operation or need to move inventory — we guide you end to end.

01 — Consulting

Remanufacturing Operations

Facility setup, tooling, grading standards, repair workflows, and QC processes built to scale for consumer and enterprise hardware programs.

→
02 — Strategy

Sell-Through Planning

Custom go-to-market plans across Amazon, eBay, B2B wholesale, and global export — maximizing recovery on every unit with the right channel mix.

→
03 — Advisory

Liquidation Strategy

We assess your inventory, identify the right buyers and channels, and structure bulk deals — consumer or enterprise — that close fast at the right price.

→
04 — Operations

Logistics & Fulfillment

End-to-end logistics — inbound, warehousing, international export, customs, and last-mile delivery to buyers in South America, the Middle East, and globally.

→

By the Numbers

The market data.

$82B
Global Market by 2028

The certified refurbished electronics market grows at over 10% CAGR as consumers and businesses seek cost-effective, sustainable alternatives to new devices.

3×
Faster Than New Device Sales

Refurbished smartphone sales grow 3× faster than new, driven by rising prices, improved quality standards, and growing environmental awareness worldwide.

68%
Emerging Market Preference

In South America and the Middle East, nearly 7 in 10 buyers actively prefer certified refurbished devices over new, citing value and accessibility.

40%
Average Savings vs. New

Buyers save 30–50% on certified refurbished devices versus retail. This gap widens as flagship prices rise, expanding the addressable market annually.

1.4B
Devices Eligible Annually

1.4 billion consumer electronics enter the secondary market each year globally. Less than 15% are currently refurbished — a massive untapped opportunity.

2×
Amazon & eBay Growth (2022–24)

Certified refurbished listings on Amazon and eBay doubled in two years, reflecting surging consumer trust and major platform investment in verified programs.

Case Studies

Results that speak for themselves.

Work we have done helping partners move inventory, build operations, and reach new markets.

Liquidation Strategy

Turning 14,000 Units of Stranded Inventory Into a $2.1M Recovery

A U.S. returns processor had no clear exit channel. We segmented by type and condition, executed a multi-channel plan across B2B export and marketplace listings — cleared in 60 days.

$2.1M
Recovery Value

Market Expansion

Launching a South American Export Channel from Zero in 90 Days

A mid-size refurbisher wanted South America but had no relationships, logistics, or compliance knowledge. We built the channel end to end across three countries.

90 Days
3 Countries Live
Work with us →
Operations Consulting

Scaling a Repair Operation from 200 to 2,000 Units Per Week

10×
Output in 6 Months
